title: Earnings Call Transcript: PayPal Q1 2026 Beats Forecasts, Stock Drops
text: PayPal Q1 2026 earnings call transcript shows company beat forecasts but stock dropped in premarket. Non-GAAP EPS of $1.34 beat estimates of $1.27. Revenue of $8.35 billion beat $8.05 billion consensus. Payment volume reached $463.95 billion, up 11%. However, forward guidance for Q2 2026 expecting 9% EPS decline triggered profit-taking. Investors weighed quality of earnings against near-term headwinds from restructuring and margin pressure. Initial enthusiasm for earnings beat quickly evaporated.
